summary: Focused test of iteration 2 additions: MongoDB persistence for enforcement acknowledge, OpenAQ env-gated wiring, and /pitch deck route. All checks passed.
passed: GET /api/kpis returns data_mode='synthetic_seeded', live_blend_wards=0, data_disclosure mentions OPENAQ_API_KEY
POST /api/enforcement/reset returns {ok:true, reset:13} and clears state
After 'sudo supervisorctl restart backend', REC-1005 still acknowledged in GET /api/enforcement (KPI shows pending:12, ack:1) — Mongo hydration verified
Header pitch-link visible and navigates to /pitch
pitch-prev disabled on slide 1, pitch-next enabled
pitch-next disabled on slide 10, pitch-prev enabled
pitch-prev click goes back to slide 09 / 10
Home '/' after reset shows KPI: 13 Pending Enforcement, 0 acknowledged (visually confirmed in screenshot)
notes: Pitch deck dot test IDs are 0-indexed (pitch-dot-0 through pitch-dot-9), not 1-indexed as the review request implied. This is consistent with the array iteration in Pitch.jsx. Not a defect; just a documentation nuance.

Playwright force-click on pitch-next required JS .click() bypass because the 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay intercepts pointer events at the bottom-right where pitch-next sits. This is a test-harness artifact, NOT an app bug — real users can click the button (badge is bottom-right edge, button is to the right of dot row).
mocked_apis_acknowledged: Synthetic AQI + registry data (data_mode='synthetic_seeded', disclosed in UI via Methodology card)
